channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Eagles defensive end Brandon Graham returns from torn triceps for Super Bowl
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Philadelphia Eagles star defensive end Brandon Graham was cleared to return from a torn triceps suffered 11 weeks ago and will play in the Super Bowl against Kansas City. The 36-year-old Graham was thought to be done for the season after he was injured in a Nov.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: LeBron James will sit out the Lakers' game against Indiana to rest his sore left ankle
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — LeBron James is sitting out the Los Angeles Lakers ' game against Indiana on Saturday to rest his sore left ankle. The Lakers announced the decision about four hours before they hosted the Pacers.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Brandel Chamblee, who has long opposed LIV Golf, says he's second-guessing himself after playing with Trump
item.description: Amid President Donald Trump's involvement in PGA and LIV talks, Brandel Chamblee admitted the president has him second-guessing his LIV opposition.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: NFL great Lawrence Taylor recalls stern warning he gave Joe Montana during testy confrontation
item.description: NFL legend Lawrence Taylor told an incredible story about warning quarterback Joe Montana, during an appearance on OutKick's "The Ricky Cobb Show.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ben Simmons waived by the Nets after the team and former No. 1 pick agree to a buyout
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Ben Simmons was waived by the Brooklyn Nets on Saturday after the team agreed to a buyout with the last remaining link to a failed era of building around All-Stars. The No.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Longtime NFL player and coach Dick Jauron dies at 74
item.description: Longtime NFL player and coach Dick Jauron, who led the Chicago Bears to the playoffs and was voted AP coach of the year in 2001, died Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dave Skretta, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: CMU Football signing day recap
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— The football program is entering a new era after 42 student-athletes officially committed to the Mavericks, officials said. “The thing I tell these guys when they go through recruiting is, ‘You’ve got to be where your feet are.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: The NFL’s postseason schedule is a big problem for the College Football Playoff that could get much worse
item.description: If Roger Goodell gets his way and the NFL adds an 18th game, the College Football Playoff could be relegated to the back burner in January.
item.dc:creator: Jon Wilner, The Mercury News

item.title: Kamala Harris receives icy reaction at Lakers game while fans call out unimpressive seats
item.description: Former Vice President Kamala Harris wasn't a fan favorite when she and husband Doug Emhoff were spotted at Lakers game on Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: McCallum wins all-around as Red Rocks beat Arizona
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Grace McCallum won the all-around with a score of 39.65 to lead the 4th-ranked Utah gymnastics team past #19 Arizona, 197.675 to 196.125.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Matthew Stafford's wife sounds off on Rams amid speculation about quarterback's future, Cooper Kupp trade news
item.description: Kelly Stafford, the wife of Los Angeles Rams quarterback Matthew Stafford, says their family is open to the idea of relocating amid offseason drama involving the veteran's future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cincinnati Zoo hippo picks winner of Super Bowl LIX
item.description: The last time the Cincinnati Zoo's hippo Fiona picked the Philadelphia Eagles to win the Super Bowl, she was correct.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UMass will pay student who made half-court $10,000 after insurance company said his foot was on line
item.description: A UMass student who made a half-court shot during a women’s basketball game halftime promotion will get his $10,000 prize from the school itself after the insurance company refused to pay because, it said, his foot was on the line.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: WM's zero-waste approach to golf's raucous Phoenix Open catching on in the sports world
item.description: SCOTTSDALE, Ariz. (AP) — The Phoenix Open's famously booze-soaked 16th hole is one of the unique spectacles in golf, where the normally gentile sport lets loose with stadium-style seating, deafening music and an enthusiastic announcer introducing players in a scene that's more WWE than PGA Tour.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dylan Guenther scores game-winner in OT again
item.description: COLUMBUS (ABC4 Sports) - Dylan Guenther has proven to have a penchant for the dramatic. For the second straight game, Utah's leading scorer found the back of the net in the final minute of overtime to give UHC a 3-2 win over Columbus Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Edwards scores 49 to lead Wolves over short-handed Bulls 127-108
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — Anthony Edwards scored 49 points, including 20 in the third quarter, as the Minnesota Timberwolves beat the short-handed Chicago Bulls 127-108 on Wednesday night. Edwards hit six 3-pointers and was 17 of 18 from the free-throw line and also added nine rebounds.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jimmy Butler headed to Golden State, Andrew Wiggins to Miami, AP source says
item.description: Jimmy Butler got what he wanted. He's being traded out of Miami and got a new contract in the process. The Heat and the Golden State Warriors have agreed on a deal that sends Butler to the Bay Area, a person with knowledge of the talks said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Rams headed Down Under for NFL's 1st game in Australia
item.description: LOS ANGELES (KTLA) — The Los Angeles Rams are set to make NFL history Down Under next year. The squad announced Wednesday that they're headed to Melbourne, Australia, in 2026 to play the league's first regular season game in the country.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5

item.title: USU hits 20-win mark with 71-67 victory at Wyoming
item.description: LARAMIE, Wyo. (ABC4 Sports) - Coming off its most disappointing performance of the season, a 19-point loss at home to New Mexico, the Utah State basketball rebounded nicely with a hard-fought 71-67 victory at Wyoming Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Major League Baseball fires ump amid gambling probe
item.description: Umpire Pat Hoberg was fired after it was revealed he shared betting accounts with a friend who bet on baseball.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, Fox 5

item.title: Caleb Williams voted GQ's most stylish football player
item.description: CHICAGO (WGN) — Chicago Bears quarterback Caleb Williams has earned his first accolade since joining the NFL as the league's No. 1 overall pick last April. He took home GQ's fan vote for the Most Stylish Football Player Monday.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: President Trump welcomes Florida Panthers to the White House
item.description: The Florida Panthers were the first professional championship team to be celebrated at the White House under the new Trump administration on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Connell, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utah loses fifth straight in another close game
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club has been in nearly every game the last couple weeks, but have not been able to close teams out. Jordan Kyrou broke a tie in the third period to help the St.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Chase Elliott wins Clash at Bowman Gray and sets sights on following it with Daytona 500 victory
item.description: NASCAR returned to its roots with a fight-free preseason exhibition at Bowman Gray Stadium and a popular victory with Chase Elliott winning The Clash on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Report: Bulls trade Zach LaVine to Kings
item.description: The Chicago Bulls are trading star shooting guard Zach LaVine to the Sacramento Kings, according to ESPN's Shams Charania.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, NewsNation

item.title: Rory McIlroy overpowers Pebble Beach and wins in a runaway
item.description: The combination of one of golf's biggest stars and America's most scenic coastal golf course was the just the spark the PGA Tour needed, and both lived up to their reputations Sunday in the AT&T Pebble Beach Pro-Am.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: DeWanna Bonner will join the Indiana Fever, AP source says
item.description: DeWanna Bonner is headed to Indiana to join Caitlin Clark and the Fever, a person familiar with the deal told The Associated Press on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Luka Doncic to the Lakers, Anthony Davis to the Mavs in blockbuster trade, AP source says
item.description: Luka Doncic is being traded by the reigning Western Conference champion Dallas Mavericks to the Los Angeles Lakers for Anthony Davis, a person with knowledge of the agreement said early Sunday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: A Blackhawks record: Landon Slaggert scores 7 seconds into a game against Florida
item.description: Landon Slaggert scored seven seconds into Chicago's game at the Panthers on Saturday afternoon — the fastest goal to start a game ever for the Blackhawks, according to the NHL record book.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Reinhart scores 30th, Maurice wins 900th as Panthers top Blackhawks after Slaggert's 7-second goal
item.description: Sam Reinhart got his 30th goal of the season and added two assists, Matthew Tkachuk scored for the third time in the last four games and the Florida Panthers beat the Chicago Blackhawks 5-1 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
